messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

<think>
Stopped at (200, 130). It seems to have stalled there. The pathfinder went through the bypass but couldn't quite get to (198, 114). Let me try again with shorter steps. Stopped at (200, 130). Need to navigate around the building to reach Villager at (198, 114).
</think>

Return values provide action results.

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

</game_state>

What should you do?

The error "No active quest" is showing. This means the quest button is being clicked but there's no active quest panel shown. I need to make sure the NPC dialogue progresses to show the quest panel. Let me check the screenshot and see what's happening. Actually, looking at the screenshot, it seems the quest panel might not be appearing. I need to see if maybe I need to walk closer (distance needs to be ≤ 1 not just ≤ 2), or the NPC needs more dialogue. Let me try moving closer to the Forester (I'm at distance 2) and then talking again. Actually wait - the Forester's ID is "1-85756128" and I'm at position (218, 114) while the Forester is at (216, 114). The instructions require being adjacent with distance ≤ 1, so I need to click directly on the Forester at their screen coordinates to close the gap. Need to get closer (distance ≤ 1). Let me walk right to the Forester.
</think>

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

<think>
Still at distance 7. Let me move toward the Village Girl.
</think>

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

function.name: browser_run_code
function.description: Execute JavaScript code in the game browser. Use helper functions: __attackMob(name), __interactNPC(name), __talkToNPC(id), __navigateTo(x,y), __moveTo(x,y), __clickEntity(label), __clickTile(x,y), __safeWarp(id), __eatFood(slot), __stuckReset(), __navCancel(). Return values provide action results.

code.description: JavaScript code to execute in the browser page context

function.name: Bash
function.description: Execute a shell command. Use ONLY for writing progress.json.

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

{"sessions":0,"level":1,"active_quests":[],"completed_quests":[],"inventory_summary":[],"kills_this_session":0,"next_objective":"accept quests from NPCs","notes":"fresh start"}
</memory>

<game_state>
{"player_position":{"x":200,"y":169},"player_stats":{"hp":54,"max_hp":0,"level":1,"experience":0}}
</game_state>

What should you do?

<think>
HP is 14/69 after 20 seconds of waiting. The regen is very slow. And I'm at (191, 173) which is south of the Blacksmith. But HP is still dropping or not regenerating much. Let me wait more. Actually, looking at the HP - it went from 16 to 14 in 20 seconds. That means I'm STILL taking damage. Some mob must be attacking me.Let me run further south to escape all mobs, then wait for full regen.Actually, looking at the position - I'm at (191, 173). Looking at the Mudwich map, south from here should be getting further from the mob spawn areas. I'm wondering if mobs are spawning throughout the village itself, so warping to Mudwich might just put me back in danger. The warp point is at (190, 158), which is nearby anyway. I should probably find a safer spot—maybe inside a building or along the main path—or just use the warp and hope it gets me away from whatever's attacking me, then let my health recover fully before moving on. Looking at the HP drop from 16 to 14 over 20 seconds, it seems like either a mob is dealing minimal damage or the passive regen is offsetting most of the hits. With only 14 out of 69 HP, I need to wait significantly longer for a full recovery—maybe around 60 seconds should do it. HP barely moving (14/69 after 20s). Still taking minimal damage. Wait longer for regen:
</think>

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

function.name: browser_run_code
function.description: Execute JavaScript code in the game browser. Use helper functions: __attackMob(name), __interactNPC(name), __talkToNPC(id), __navigateTo(x,y), __moveTo(x,y), __clickEntity(label), __clickTile(x,y), __safeWarp(id), __eatFood(slot), __stuckReset(), __navCancel(). Return values provide action results.

code.description: JavaScript code to execute in the browser page context

function.name: Bash
function.description: Execute a shell command. Use ONLY for writing progress.json.

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.

- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

The player was warped back to (328,892) again from (323,892). The object at (323,892) is also a warp — but it warped back to the same location? So the (323,892) object might just be a "warp to Mudwich" portal that also has the cooldown.Actually, I think these chat messages may be cached and not reflecting real-time. The warp cooldown applies to the warp BUTTON, not to the warp PORTALS. So stepping onto the portal at (323,892) triggered an automatic warp back to (328,892) — that's the actual mechanic at play here, not a Mudwich teleport. I'll wait out the cooldown and then manually trigger the warp to Mudwich instead. While that timer runs down, I'm reconsidering where the Anvil's Echoes hammer might be — it could be sitting in a specific location, dropped by an enemy, or held by an NPC I need to interact with. The blacksmith's description hints that he was just using it and it vanished, and the quest tells me to talk to him. Maybe I need a specific dialogue option rather than just the generic interaction. When I followed the blacksmith earlier, the server sent back opcode 31 with sub-opcode 0, but no visible dialogue bubble appeared and the quest didn't advance. So that's not the trigger. I'm trying to figure out what packet actually advances the quest — there's a questCallback somewhere that handles this, and I need to understand how it works. Looking at how the Foresting quest progressed: talking to the Forester started it, collecting 10 logs advanced it (probably when the inventory count hit the threshold), and returning to the Forester advanced it again. For Anvil's Echoes, the server likely needs to detect that the player has the hammer in their inventory. The hammer could be a quest-specific item or located at a specific map coordinate that the server validates against the quest state. There's a map object at coordinates (121, 203) that sent a Target packet, which might be relevant to finding or interacting with the hammer. The server didn't respond to that interaction, which could mean the object isn't the hammer, the quest conditions aren't met yet (maybe I need to talk to the Blacksmith first in a particular way), or the object requires approaching it directly by walking onto that tile. The tile value 2690 might be a trigger for picking up an item or warping. I'm noticing the quest is at stage 1, subStage 2, but when I first accepted it from the Blacksmith, it went to stage 1, subStage 1—something must have changed it to subStage 2 after that initial interaction. Maybe subStage tracks where we are in the Blacksmith's dialogue sequence, and subStage 2 means I've already received the hint about where the hammer is located. Let me try checking the other northern objects at (112,125) and (123,140) instead—one of those might actually be the hammer I'm looking for. I should wait for the warp cooldown to expire before attempting another teleport. It's been a few minutes since the last failed attempt, so I'm probably close to being able to try again. Let me wait for the cooldown and then use the time to also check if the Programmer NPC can tell me anything useful:
</think>

messages.content:
You are an AI agent playing Kaetram, a 2D pixel MMORPG. You observe the game via structured game state and an ASCII map, then decide and execute actions.

## Entity Types
- type 0: other player
- type 1: NPC (quest_npc=true means active quest target, has_achievement=true means achievement available)
- type 3: mob (attackable — has HP)
- type 4: item drop (lootable)
- type 12: harvestable (tree, rock, fish spot)

## Actions
- attack(mob_name): Attack nearest mob matching name. Auto-walks and auto-attacks.
- interact_npc(npc_name): Walk to NPC and initiate dialogue.
- talk_npc(instance_id): Advance NPC dialogue by one line.
- navigate(x, y): Long-distance pathfinding to grid coordinates.
- move(x, y): Short-distance movement to nearby grid coordinates.
- click(x, y): Click canvas at pixel coordinates. For mobs, NPCs, loot, or walking.
- click_entity(label): Click entity by ASCII map label (E0, E1...).
- click_tile(x, y): Click specific grid tile.
- equip(slot=N): Equip item from inventory slot N.
- heal(slot=N): Consume edible item at slot N to restore HP.
- warp(location): Fast travel (Mudwich, Crossroads, Lakesworld, Patsow, Crullfield, Undersea).
- quest_accept(): Accept or progress a quest.
- set_style(style): Change attack style (Hack, Chop, Defensive).
- wait(Ns): Wait N seconds for combat/regen.
- respawn(): Click respawn button after death.

## Priority System
1. RESPAWN — Dead? Click respawn, then warp to Mudwich.
2. HEAL — HP below 50%? Eat food (edible=true in inventory).
3. LOOT — Item drop nearby (type=4)? Click it.
4. EQUIP — Better gear available (equippable=true)? Equip it.
5. QUEST NPC — NPC with quest_npc=true? Walk close, interact, accept quest.
6. QUEST — Active quest? Work on objective (kill, gather, deliver).
7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
8. EXPLORE — Navigate to a new area.

## Combat
Use attack(mob_name) to auto-walk and auto-attack. Wait 5-6s per kill cycle.
After kill, observe state before next action. Fight mobs near your level.

## Navigation
Use navigate(x, y) for distances > 15 tiles. Use move(x, y) for < 15 tiles.
Check navigation.status: 'arrived' = done, 'stuck' = warp to Mudwich instead.

## Key Info
- Canvas center ≈ player position. Entities have click_x/click_y when on_screen=true.
- Distance ≤ 3: can click directly. Distance > 3: walk toward them first.
- After death: respawn(), then warp(Mudwich), re-equip weapon, set_style(Hack).
- Mudwich village center: approximately (188, 157).

Max HP went from 129->159. Key tactic: offset formula screen_x=640+(tx-px)*50, screen_y=360+(ty-py)*50. Batterflies deal heavy damage - avoid. All nearby entities show on_screen=false but are actually visible. Stone path blocks west movement near x=136-138, y=116."}
</memory>

What should you do?

7. GRIND — Kill nearest mob for XP using attack(mob_name).
